subtitle.en: Upload, encode, store and deliver video with a built-in player
subtitle.zh: 上傳、編碼、儲存並傳送影片，內建可調品質播放器

tagline.en: Add live and on-demand video to your app with one API — no servers, no encoding pipeline to babysit.
tagline.zh: 用一支 API 就能在你的網站加上直播與隨選影片——不用架伺服器，也不用自己顧編碼流程。

text.en: Cloudflare Stream is an all-in-one video platform: you upload a video (or start a live broadcast) and Cloudflare encodes it, stores it, and delivers it worldwide with a ready-made player you can embed in one line.
text.zh: Cloudflare Stream 是一套「全包式」影片平台：你上傳一支影片（或開一場直播），Cloudflare 會幫你編碼、儲存，並透過全球網路傳送，還附上一個只要一行就能嵌入的播放器。

text.en: Encoding (also called transcoding) means converting your raw video into multiple sizes and a streaming-friendly format. Stream does this automatically, so the same upload plays smoothly on a phone on slow data or a laptop on fast Wi-Fi.
text.zh: 編碼（又叫轉碼，transcoding）就是把你的原始影片轉成多種尺寸、以及適合串流的格式。Stream 會自動做好這件事，所以同一支上傳的影片，在訊號差的手機或快速 Wi-Fi 的筆電上都能順暢播放。

title.en: Think of it like a video factory + courier
title.zh: 把它想成影片工廠＋宅配

text.en: You drop off one master tape. The factory makes copies in every quality, and a global courier hands the right copy to each viewer based on their screen and internet speed — instantly.
text.zh: 你只交出一卷母帶，工廠幫你製作各種畫質的版本，全球宅配再依每位觀眾的螢幕與網速，即時把最合適的版本送到他手上。

text.en: Running your own video infrastructure is hard and expensive: encoding servers, storage, a streaming protocol, a player, and bandwidth bills. Stream replaces that whole stack with one API and predictable per-minute pricing.
text.zh: 自己經營影片基礎設施又難又貴：要有編碼伺服器、儲存空間、串流協定、播放器，還有可怕的頻寬帳單。Stream 用一支 API 取代這一整套，並採用好預估的「分鐘計費」。

text.en: Uploads are transcoded into an adaptive bitrate ladder automatically. Encoding and ingest are free.
text.zh: 上傳的影片會自動轉成「自適應位元率」的多畫質版本。編碼與上傳都免費。

text.en: A polished, mobile-friendly player ships with it — embed via an iframe, no coding required.
text.zh: 附帶一個精緻、適配手機的播放器——用 iframe 就能嵌入，不用寫程式。

text.en: Pay only for minutes stored and minutes watched. No surprise egress (bandwidth) fees.
text.zh: 只為「儲存的分鐘數」與「被觀看的分鐘數」付費，沒有突如其來的流量（egress）費用。

text.en: Signed URLs let you protect paid or private videos so only authorized viewers can play them.
text.zh: 用簽章網址（signed URL）保護付費或私人影片，只有獲授權的觀眾才能播放。

text.en: Host lesson videos that stream smoothly to students on any device or connection.
text.zh: 存放教學影片，讓學生在任何裝置、任何網速下都能順暢觀看。

text.en: Broadcast events, webinars, or gaming live, then keep the recording on demand.
text.zh: 直播活動、研討會或遊戲實況，結束後還能保留成隨選影片。

text.en: Let users upload clips with one-time URLs and play them back instantly.
text.zh: 用一次性網址讓使用者上傳短片，並立即可播放。

text.en: Embed product demos or hero videos without slowing down your site.
text.zh: 嵌入產品示範或主視覺影片，又不拖慢你的網站。

text.en: We'll upload a video, wait for it to finish encoding, then embed the player. You only need an API token and your Account ID from the Cloudflare dashboard.
text.zh: 我們會上傳一支影片、等它編碼完成，然後嵌入播放器。你只需要在 Cloudflare 控制台拿到一組 API 權杖和你的 Account ID。

text.en: Export your API token and Account ID so the commands below can use them. The token is like a password for your code.
text.zh: 先把 API 權杖和 Account ID 設成環境變數，下面的指令才用得到。權杖就像給程式用的密碼。

text.en: For files under 200 MB you can post the file directly. The -F file=@ part attaches a local video.
text.zh: 小於 200 MB 的檔案可以直接上傳，-F file=@ 就是附上本機影片檔。

text.en: Already have the video online? Tell Stream to fetch it. The response includes a uid — the video's unique id.
text.zh: 影片已經在網路上了？直接叫 Stream 去抓。回應裡會有一個 uid，就是這支影片的唯一代號。

text.en: Encoding takes a moment. When status.state is 'ready' and readyToStream is true, you can play it.
text.zh: 編碼需要一點時間。當 status.state 變成 ready、readyToStream 為 true，就可以播放了。

text.en: Paste this iframe into your page. Replace <CODE> with your customer code and <UID> with the video uid. Done — a full adaptive player appears.
text.zh: 把這段 iframe 貼到你的網頁，<CODE> 換成你的 customer code、<UID> 換成影片 uid。完成——一個完整的自適應播放器就出現了。

code.body:
<iframe
  src="https://customer-<CODE>.cloudflarestream.com/<UID>/iframe"
  title="My first video"
  allow="accelerometer; gyroscope; autoplay; encrypted-media; picture-in-picture;"
  allowfullscreen="true"
  style="border: none; width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16/9;">
</iframe>

text.en: For uploads over 200 MB (up to a 30 GB max), Stream supports the tus protocol, which resumes the upload if your connection drops.
text.zh: 超過 200 MB（最大 30 GB）的上傳，Stream 支援 tus 協定；它會在連線中斷時自動續傳，不用整個重來。

title.en: Adaptive bitrate 自適應位元率

text.en: The player automatically switches between quality levels based on the viewer's network — fewer buffering spinners.
text.zh: 播放器會依觀眾的網速自動切換畫質，減少「轉圈圈」卡頓。

text.en: Converting your original into multiple resolutions and a streaming format (HLS/DASH). Stream does this for you.
text.zh: 把原始影片轉成多種解析度與串流格式（HLS／DASH）。這由 Stream 自動完成。

text.en: Streaming protocols that chop video into small chunks so playback can adapt quality on the fly.
text.zh: 串流協定，把影片切成小片段，讓播放時能即時切換畫質。

text.en: Time-limited tokens that restrict who can watch — perfect for paid or private content.
text.zh: 有時效的權杖，限制誰能觀看——很適合付費或私人內容。

title.en: Direct creator upload 直接上傳

text.en: One-time upload URLs you give users so they upload to Stream without seeing your API token.
text.zh: 發給使用者的一次性上傳網址，讓他們直接上傳到 Stream，又看不到你的 API 權杖。

text.en: A reusable endpoint you stream to (via RTMPS/SRT) for live broadcasts, with optional recording.
text.zh: 一個可重複使用的端點，你用 RTMPS／SRT 推流上去做直播，還能選擇自動錄影。

text.en: You pay $5 per 1,000 minutes of video stored per month, and $1 per 1,000 minutes delivered (watched). Uploading and encoding are always free, and there are no separate bandwidth charges.
text.zh: 每月每 1,000 分鐘「儲存」5 美元，每 1,000 分鐘「傳送（被觀看）」1 美元。上傳與編碼一律免費，也沒有額外的頻寬費。

text.en: Stored minutes are bought in advance. If you run out, you can't upload new videos or start live streams until you add more storage or delete old videos.
text.zh: 儲存分鐘數是預先購買的。一旦用完，在你加購或刪掉舊影片之前，就無法上傳新影片或開新直播。

en: Live and on-demand video are billed the same way — by minutes stored and delivered.
Max single upload is 30 GB; use tus for anything large to get resumable uploads.
Add captions/subtitles and a thumbnail to make videos more accessible and clickable.
Use signed URLs for paid content so links can't be freely shared.
zh: 直播與隨選影片計費方式相同——都看「儲存」與「傳送」的分鐘數。
單檔上傳上限 30 GB；大檔請用 tus，才能斷線續傳。
加上字幕與縮圖，讓影片更易讀也更吸引點擊。
付費內容請用簽章網址，連結才不會被隨意轉傳。
